summary: Frontend testing completed for header, hero, audio player, and mobile responsiveness features. All 8 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Header sticky: position:fixed confirmed, remains visible after scrolling 500px
Brand with Montserrat font on left: fontFamily verified as 'Montserrat, sans-serif' on brand text
Navigation menu on right: Desktop nav positioned at x=1125 (right side of 1920px viewport)
Hamburger menu on mobile: data-testid='mobile-menu-btn' visible on 390px viewport, desktop nav hidden
Hamburger menu functional: Opens sheet with navigation links (Inicio, Propiedades, Sobre Nosotros, Contacto)
Hero/Video 100% width: Hero section width = 1920px (full viewport)
'Música de Fondo (URL de Audio)' field in admin: Visible in 'Marca y Logo' tab with data-testid='background-audio-input'
Section order Hero → Search → Properties: Verified via getBoundingClientRect().top values
No horizontal scroll on mobile: scrollWidth = clientWidth = 390px confirmed
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent accessibility warnings in console - missing DialogTitle for SheetContent in mobile menu (not blocking functionality)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from this iteration verified: 1) Header.jsx has sticky (position:fixed) header with Montserrat font for brand text, logo on left, nav on right, hamburger on mobile. 2) HomePage.jsx has full-width hero section with 100vw width, correct section order (Hero→Search→Properties). 3) AudioPlayer.jsx component integrated in App.js PageWrapper, only renders when background_audio_url is configured. 4) AdminPage.jsx 'Marca y Logo' tab contains 'Música de Fondo (URL de Audio)' input field with data-testid='background-audio-input'. 5) App.js PageWrapper has overflow-x-hidden to prevent horizontal scroll.

features_verified.header_sticky: VERIFIED - position:fixed in Header.jsx, visible after scroll
features_verified.montserrat_font_left: VERIFIED - fontFamily: Montserrat on brand span, logo-link on left
features_verified.audio_field_admin: VERIFIED - background-audio-input in Marca y Logo tab
